title: omalotheca sylvatica subsp. carpetana
intro: Omalotheca sylvatica subsp. carpetana, also known as the Pyrenean cabbage or Pyrenees woolly hair sedge, is a subspecies of plant in the family Asteraceae. It is used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can be beneficial for wound healing and skin issues. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation and improving digestive health, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness. Herbal preparations of Omalotheca sylvatica subsp. carpetana typically involve infusions or decoctions of the leaves or roots, which can be consumed as teas or used topically as a poultice or salve.
